ksa_text: Test and validate analytical outputs and data pipelines, including creating testing procedures, developing automated test frameworks, performing quality assurance, and verifying that analytical results are accurate and reproducible.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of data classification standards and methodologies based on sensitivity and other risk factors.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-T-009 (Core Abilities/Task) scores 0.423 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.423) and is in_scope for the Data Engineer role. The KSA aligns with Core Abilities competencies expected of a Data Engineer at IC-to-senior IC level. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with in_scope scope, DDaT signal (0.423), and Core Abilities handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support this Core Ability as a distinct Data Engineer competency at IC/senior IC level?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: General abilities appear implicitly in DE postings but rarely as discrete competencies. When explicit, they appear in context of pipeline design, data modeling, or quality enforcement (DE signals here: 4, composite: 0.423).
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Core ability with 4 DE signals and composite 0.423 reflects market-relevant technical judgment. Final decision: include.
